modules.name: Project Execution Memory
modules.globalRole: Keep the project structure, task decomposition, acceptance criteria, and execution order recoverable across sessions.
modules.nextAction: Use this map before starting each new module task.

modules.name: Backend API Contracts
modules.globalRole: Provide stable HTTP boundaries for the frontend, ingestion workers, review workflow, and LearningAgent adapter.
completedEvidence: backend/tests/test_api_routes.py covers upload lookup and missing upload
modules.nextAction: Move to M2 PostgreSQL repositories. Candidate review belongs to M7.

modules.name: PostgreSQL Persistence
modules.globalRole: Replace in-memory demo state with durable deployable product state.
completedEvidence: backend/app/adapters/postgres.py implements document and ingestion-job repositories
backend/tests/test_postgres_adapters.py covers repository SQL paths with fake connections
backend/tests/test_postgres_integration.py provides opt-in live migration and round-trip coverage
modules.nextAction: Move to M3 ingestion worker. Re-run M2 live integration when valid local PostgreSQL credentials are available.

modules.name: Ingestion Worker
modules.globalRole: Transform uploaded materials into parsed chunks, classified knowledge, embeddings, and jobs.
completedEvidence: backend/app/services/ingestion_worker.py parses text, chunks content, classifies categories, indexes chunks, and generates candidates
GET /v1/knowledge/candidates exposes generated candidates for inspection
backend/tests/test_ingestion_worker.py and backend/tests/test_api_routes.py cover the upload-to-candidate flow
modules.nextAction: Move to M4 retrieval or harden M3 with durable chunks, PDF parsing, embeddings, and async queue execution.

modules.name: Retrieval And RAG
modules.globalRole: Make uploaded knowledge searchable and usable by agent workflows.
completedEvidence: backend/app/services/retrieval.py adds a retrieval service behind VectorRepositoryPort
backend/tests/test_retrieval.py and backend/tests/test_api_routes.py cover local search behavior
modules.nextAction: Add PostgreSQL full-text, pgvector dense recall, and RRF fusion in the next M4 hardening slice.

modules.name: Memory System
modules.globalRole: Persist learning memory and durable insights with review gates.

modules.name: LearningAgent Adapter
modules.globalRole: Reuse the existing learning agent without coupling Study AI to its internals.

modules.name: Candidate Review And Graph Writeback
modules.globalRole: Protect the approved knowledge graph from unreviewed AI output.

modules.name: Frontend Workflows
modules.globalRole: Turn backend capability into usable upload, review, retrieval, and graph experiences.

modules.name: Deployment And Ops
modules.globalRole: Make the system public, observable, recoverable, and cloud-ready.

modules.name: Scale Practice Lab
modules.globalRole: Create realistic high-traffic and failure scenarios in a personal project.

modules.name: JVM Companion Learning
modules.globalRole: Learn Java/JVM/backend concepts through small services and labs tied to real Study AI problems.

promptToArtifactChecklist: User requested module-by-module project structure: docs/architecture/module-task-map.md lists M0-M11 with global role, work items, done criteria, and execution order.
User wanted context-loss prevention: .omx/context/study-ai-module-execution-20260607T065711Z.md, PRD, test spec, and progress ledger were created.
User wanted planning followed by execution: M1 started with GET /v1/uploads/{document_id} and route tests.
User wanted PostgreSQL/JVM/high-scale direction preserved: module map includes M2 PostgreSQL Persistence, M10 Scale Practice Lab, and M11 JVM Companion Learning.
M2 completed the documents/jobs PostgreSQL adapter slice while leaving live DB validation opt-in behind credentials.
M3 completed the markdown/txt local ingestion worker slice while keeping approval in M7.
M4 completed the local keyword retrieval boundary while deferring PostgreSQL full-text, pgvector dense recall, and RRF fusion.
verificationEvidence: python -m unittest discover -s tests: 24 tests OK, 1 skipped live DB test
AI slop cleaner scoped scan found no masking fallback-like code in changed files
